'''Fivvic''' was a [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] officer with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the Task Force [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] for the survey team assigned to [[Mission to Dagro|scout]] the planet [[Dagro]]. Like the rest of his [[Species/Legends|species]], Fivvic was highly respectful of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. That respect, however, didn't transfer as much to their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]].

Fivvic later participated in the rescue of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on Dagro.
